stage: function-first null-first cross-parent MoE probe (protocol steps 1-4)

what_was_built.fp4_dequant: validated: e2m1 nibble decode lands on the grid with 0.0 error, ue8m0 block scale [out,in/32]
what_was_built.fp8_dequant: e4m3 shared expert with [128,128] block scale
what_was_built.moe_forward: real: sqrtsoftplus + noaux_tc top-6, SwiGLU with clamp, shared expert, routed scale 1.5; output RMS 0.11, 6 distinct experts routed

result.reading: on both learned-routing layers the functional student and the full affine map LOSE to predicting a constant, so no cheap function reproduces this MoE from the input provided. The DeepSeek MoE output is not mean-dominated (null raw cosine 0.20 to 0.55 versus GLM's 0.83), which is a real architectural difference: the 6-of-256 sqrtsoftplus routing produces a sharply discrete output a smooth student cannot approximate.

confound.input_quality: the probe uses embedding-seeded ffn_norm(embed[token]) inputs, which carry no attention context, whereas GLM's decisive results used real chained pre_router_hidden from a captured forward
confound.consequence: this is a real, consistent, null-corrected negative at the MoE organ, but it does not settle whether the functional escape exists with proper pre-MoE hidden states
confound.why_not_resolved_now: real pre-MoE hidden needs the DeepSeek block forward (MLA + DSA compressor/indexer + hyper-connections), and that forward cannot be validated without reference logits, which do not fit on a 96 GiB box. An unvalidated forward would fabricate the amplification verdict, which the whole null-first thesis forbids.

methodology_transfer_confirmed: the null-corrected metric caught a would-be false positive cross-parent: had this been scored on raw activation cosine, the student's centered 0.09 to 0.13 might have read as partial fidelity; skill against the fit-split constant shows it is worse than a constant.

protocol_disposition.rate_ladder: WITHHELD; the functional direction did not survive the existence test, so no 0.75/0.50/0.333 artifacts are built
protocol_disposition.amplification_probe: BLOCKED on a reference-logit-validated block forward
protocol_disposition.next_lane: either build and validate the MLA+DSA+hyper-connection block forward, or carry the probe to the Qwen3.5 challenger whose linear-attention residual stream is the other structural test

not_evidence_of: block, propagation, amplification, or capability. This is one organ on embedding-seeded inputs.
